tuning: E A D G B E
content:
----------------------------------------------------------------------------
                             HEY SOUL SISTER - Train
----------------------------------------------------------------------------
Tabbed by: Mike
Email: mikemonk7@gmail.com

Tuning: Standard


[Verse]

[tab][ch]E[/ch]     [ch]B[/ch]                [ch]C#m[/ch]              [ch]A[/ch]
  Hey-ay, Hey-ay-AY-ay-ay, Hey-ay-AY-ay-ay[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]E[/ch]               [ch]B[/ch]                         [ch]C#m[/ch]              [ch]A[/ch]
Your lipstick stains   on the front lobe of my left side brains[/tab]
[tab]                      [ch]E[/ch]                         [ch]B[/ch]               [ch]C#m[/ch]  [ch]A[/ch] [ch]B[/ch]
I knew I wouldn't for-get you and so I went and let you blow my mind[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]E[/ch]              [ch]B[/ch]                           [ch]C#m[/ch]            [ch]A[/ch]
Your sweet moonbeam   the smell of you in every single dream I dream[/tab]
[tab]                   [ch]E[/ch]                              [ch]B[/ch]                     [ch]C#m[/ch] [ch]A[/ch] [ch]B[/ch] 
I knew when we col-lided you're the one I have de-cided who's one of my kind[/tab]


[Chorus]

[tab][ch]A[/ch]               [ch]B[/ch]                 [ch]E[/ch]      [ch]B[/ch]      [ch]A[/ch]
Hey soul sister ain't that mister mister on the radio stereo[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]B[/ch]                 [ch]E[/ch]        [ch]B[/ch]
The way you move aint fair you know[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]               [ch]B[/ch]               [ch]E[/ch]      [ch]B[/ch]      [ch]A[/ch]            [ch]B[/ch]
Hey soul sister I don't want to miss a single thing you do[/tab]

[tab]   [ch]E[/ch]         [ch]B[/ch]                [ch]C#m[/ch]              [ch]A[/ch]
To-night Hey-ay, Hey-ay-AY-ay-ay, Hey-ay-AY-ay-ay[/tab]


[Verse]

[tab][ch]E[/ch]              [ch]B[/ch]                          [ch]C#m[/ch]                 [ch]A[/ch]
Just in ti-i-i-ime I'm so glad you have a one track mind like me[/tab]
[tab]                     [ch]E[/ch]                           [ch]B[/ch]                  [ch]C#m[/ch]  [ch]A[/ch] [ch]B[/ch]
You gave my life dir-ection a game show love con-nection we can't deny-i-iii[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]E[/ch]           [ch]B[/ch]                                 [ch]C#m[/ch]                [ch]A[/ch]
I'm so obsessed   my heart is bound to beat right outta my untrimmed chest[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]E[/ch]                           [ch]B[/ch]                          [ch]C#m[/ch]
I believe in you like a virgin you're Ma-donna and I'm always gonna wanna [/tab]
[tab]          [ch]A[/ch]    [ch]B[/ch]
blow your mind[/tab]


[Chorus]

[tab][ch]A[/ch]               [ch]B[/ch]                 [ch]E[/ch]      [ch]B[/ch]      [ch]A[/ch]
Hey soul sister ain't that mister mister on the radio stereo[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]B[/ch]                 [ch]E[/ch]        [ch]B[/ch]
The way you move aint fair you know[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]               [ch]B[/ch]               [ch]E[/ch]      [ch]B[/ch]      [ch]A[/ch]            [ch]B[/ch]
Hey soul sister I don't want to miss a single thing you do[/tab]


[Bridge]

[tab]   [ch]E[/ch]
To-night The way you can't cut a rug[/tab]
[tab][ch]B[/ch]                              [ch]C#m[/ch]
Watching you's the only drug I need[/tab]
         
You're so gangster I'm so thug
[tab]           [ch]A[/ch]                            [ch]E[/ch]
You're the only one I'm dreaming of you see[/tab]
[tab]                          [ch]B[/ch]
I can be myself now final-ly[/tab]
[tab]                                [ch]C#m[/ch]
In fact there's nothing I can't be[/tab]
[tab]                            [ch]A[/ch]       [ch]B[/ch]
I want the world to see you be with   me[/tab]


[Chorus]

[tab][ch]A[/ch]               [ch]B[/ch]                 [ch]E[/ch]      [ch]B[/ch]      [ch]A[/ch]
Hey soul sister ain't that mister mister on the radio stereo[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]B[/ch]                 [ch]E[/ch]        [ch]B[/ch]
The way you move aint fair you know[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]               [ch]B[/ch]               [ch]E[/ch]      [ch]B[/ch]      [ch]A[/ch]               [ch]B[/ch]  [ch]E[/ch]  [ch]B[/ch]
Hey soul sister I don't want to miss a single thing you do to-night[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]               [ch]B[/ch]               [ch]E[/ch]      [ch]B[/ch]      [ch]A[/ch]              [ch]B[/ch] 
Hey soul sister I don't want to miss a single thing you do-oooo[/tab]


[Outro]

[tab]   [ch]E[/ch]         [ch]B[/ch]                [ch]C#m[/ch]              [ch]A[/ch]  [ch]B[/ch] 
To-night Hey-ay, Hey-ay-AY-ay-ay, Hey-ay-AY-ay-ay [/tab]
[tab]   [ch]E[/ch]         [ch]B[/ch]                [ch]C#m[/ch]              [ch]A[/ch]  [ch]B[/ch]
To-night Hey-ay, Hey-ay-AY-ay-ay, Hey-ay-AY-ay-ay [/tab]
[tab]    [ch]E[/ch]
Ton-ight[/tab]
